mapper.sql: stand_id, zone_id, lin_ban, xiao_ban, xiao_ban_code, stand_name, area_ha, site_type, origin, stand_age, canopy_density, avg_height, avg_dbh, volume_per_ha, total_volume, dominant_species, species_composition, center_lon, center_lat, elevation, slope, aspect, survey_date, surveyor, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY xiao_ban_code
SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE stand_id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE xiao_ban_code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT dominant_species as species, COUNT(*) as standCount, SUM(area_ha) as totalArea, SUM(total_volume) as totalVolume FROM forest_stand WHERE deleted = 0 AND dominant_species IS NOT NULL AND dominant_species != '' GROUP BY dominant_species ORDER BY standCount DESC
SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE dominant_species = #{species} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY xiao_ban_code
SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE volume_per_ha > #{minVolume} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY volume_per_ha DESC
SELECT FROM forest_stand WHERE stand_age >= #{minAge} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY stand_age DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT stand_id, zone_id, lin_ban, xiao_ban, xiao_ban_code, stand_name, area_ha, site_type, origin, stand_age, canopy_density, avg_height, avg_dbh, volume_per_ha, total_volume, dominant_species, species_composition, center_lon, center_lat, elevation, slope, aspect, survey_date, surveyor, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, (6371000 * acos( LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(center_lat)) * cos(radians(center_lon) - radians(#{lon})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(center_lat)) )) )) AS distance FROM forest_stand WHERE deleted = 0 AND center_lat IS NOT NULL AND center_lon IS NOT NULL AND center_lat BETWEEN #{lat} - degrees(#{radius}::float / 6371000.0) AND #{lat} + degrees(#{radius}::float / 6371000.0) AND center_lon BETWEEN #{lon} - degrees(#{radius}::float / (6371000.0 * cos(radians(#{lat})))) AND #{lon} + degrees(#{radius}::float / (6371000.0 * cos(radians(#{lat})))) ) t WHERE distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forest_stand ( zone_id, lin_ban, xiao_ban, xiao_ban_code, stand_name, area_ha, site_type, origin, stand_age, canopy_density, avg_height, avg_dbh, volume_per_ha, total_volume, dominant_species, species_composition, center_lon, center_lat, elevation, slope, aspect, survey_date, surveyor, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{zoneId}, #{linBan}, #{xiaoBan}, #{xiaoBanCode}, #{standName}, #{areaHa}, #{siteType}, #{origin}, #{standAge}, #{canopyDensity}, #{avgHeight}, #{avgDbh}, #{volumePerHa}, #{totalVolume}, #{dominantSpecies}, #{speciesComposition}, #{centerLon}, #{centerLat}, #{elevation}, #{slope}, #{aspect}, #{surveyDate}, #{surveyor}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE forest_stand SET zone_id = #{zoneId}, lin_ban = #{linBan}, xiao_ban = #{xiaoBan}, xiao_ban_code = #{xiaoBanCode}, stand_name = #{standName}, area_ha = #{areaHa}, site_type = #{siteType}, origin = #{origin}, stand_age = #{standAge}, canopy_density = #{canopyDensity}, avg_height = #{avgHeight}, avg_dbh = #{avgDbh}, volume_per_ha = #{volumePerHa}, total_volume = #{totalVolume}, dominant_species = #{dominantSpecies}, species_composition = #{speciesComposition}, center_lon = #{centerLon}, center_lat = #{centerLat}, elevation = #{elevation}, slope = #{slope}, aspect = #{aspect}, survey_date = #{surveyDate}, surveyor = #{surveyor}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE stand_id = #{standId}
